conflict: Weeks of proximity, shared trauma, intellectual partnership, and mutual want collapse into physical contact — but the doubt about the Manor's influence makes the moment simultaneously desired and suspect
consequence: Physical threshold crossed. The doubt intensifies rather than resolving — desire and suspicion now coexist in every interaction
must_land_beats: The first kiss: not during a dramatic moment. In the library, late, tired, close over a text. Clumsy at first because they are both terrified
The kiss rendered specifically — hands, breath, the quality of the want. Not a fade-to-black
The doubt in her body during and after: is this the Manor? Is this amplification? The resonance singing between them
Afterward alone: the Manor is the warmest it has ever been and she cannot trust the warmth
pressure_source: Weeks of proximity, shared trauma, intellectual partnership, and mutual want collapse into physical contact — but the doubt about the Manor's influence makes the moment simultaneously desired and suspect
state_shift: Physical threshold crossed. The doubt intensifies rather than resolving — desire and suspicion now coexist in every interaction
